parts.text: I am Kunal, and I think the bravest thing my own mother ever did was stop answering a question I asked her so that I would be forced to find the answer with my own bruised hands. Tonight before you close your eyes you might ask yourself one thing — who in your life are you protecting so carefully that they have forgotten how to protect themselves? And here is the question I cannot stop turning over — is the deepest love the one that holds on or the one that survives letting go?
